title: Disk Wipe via Format Command
description: Detects format command execution that could indicate destructive disk wiping.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*\\format.com' and 'Command Line' like '*/y*'))
